stages.concept:
# Unit 162: 강조구문 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **강조구문**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **It is ~ that ... 강조구문** — 문장의 특정 부분을 강조

> I met **Tom** at the park yesterday.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **주어 강조**:
> **It was Tom** that I met at the park yesterday.
> 내가 어제 공원에서 만난 것은 바로 **Tom**이었다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **장소 강조**:
> **It was at the park** that I met Tom yesterday.
> 내가 어제 Tom을 만난 곳은 바로 **공원**이었다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **시간 강조**:
> **It was yesterday** that I met Tom at the park.
> 내가 공원에서 Tom을 만난 것은 바로 **어제**였다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **do/does/did + 동사원형** — 동사 강조

> I **do** love you.
> 나는 **정말** 너를 사랑해.

> She **does** study hard.
> 그녀는 **정말** 열심히 공부한다.

> He **did** come to the party.
> 그는 **정말** 파티에 왔다.

**Q. 다음 문장에서 밑줄 친 'in the library'를 강조하려고 할 때 알맞은 문장을 고르세요.**
"I studied English <u>in the library</u> today."
1. It is in the library that I studied English today.
2. It was in the library that I studied English today. ✅
3. I did study English in the library today.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 맞아요. 과거 시제(studied) 문장이므로 'It was ~ that' 사이에 강조하고 싶은 장소구인 'in the library'를 넣어서 "It was in the library that I studied English today"라고 하는 것이 정답이랍니다.

🧑‍🎓 학생: It is ~ that으로 주어/목적어/부사 강조, do/does/did로 동사 강조! 잘 기억할게요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 162: 강조구문 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 다음 문장을 강조하기 위해 보기 안에서 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
I met her at the park yesterday.
→ It was at the park (     ) I met her yesterday. (장소 강조)
> **정답** that

---

**02.** I met her at the park yesterday.
→ It was yesterday (     ) I met her at the park. (시간 강조)
> **정답** that

---

**03.** I met her at the park yesterday.
→ It was her (     ) I met at the park yesterday. (목적어 강조)
> **정답** that

---

**04.** She bought the bag at the store.
→ It was the bag (     ) she bought at the store. (목적어 강조)
> **정답** that

---

**05.** He did finish his homework.
위 문장에서 강조하는 부분은?
> **정답** did (동사 강조)

---

**06.** 다음 문장에서 강조되는 부분을 쓰시오.
It was Tom that broke the window.
> **정답** Tom (주어 강조)

---

**07.** It was yesterday that she arrived.
> **정답** yesterday (시간 강조)

---

**08.** It was at the library that I saw him.
> **정답** at the library (장소 강조)

---

**09.** She does like chocolate.
> **정답** does (동사 강조)

---

**10.** It was the movie that I liked the most.
> **정답** the movie (목적어 강조)

---

**11.** 주어진 부분을 강조하는 문장으로 바꾸시오.
He broke the window. (He 강조)
> **정답** It was he that broke the window.

---

**12.** She met him at the café. (at the café 강조)
> **정답** It was at the café that she met him.

---

**13.** I bought the book yesterday. (yesterday 강조)
> **정답** It was yesterday that I bought the book.

---

**14.** She likes music. (동사 강조)
> **정답** She does like music.

---

**15.** He helped me. (동사 강조)
> **정답** He did help me.

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
바로 Tom이 유리창을 깼다. (주어 강조)
It Tom was that broke the window
> **정답** It / was / Tom / that / broke / the / window

---

**17.** 바로 어제 그녀가 도착했다. (시간 강조)
It yesterday was that she arrived
> **정답** It / was / yesterday / that / she / arrived

---

**18.** 바로 그 가방을 그녀가 샀다. (목적어 강조)
It the was bag that she bought
> **정답** It / was / the / bag / that / she / bought

---

**19.** 그녀는 정말 초콜릿을 좋아한다. (동사 강조)
She like does chocolate
> **정답** She / does / like / chocolate

---

**20.** 그가 정말 나를 도와줬다. (동사 강조)
He help did me
> **정답** He / did / help / me
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 162: 강조구문 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 밑줄 친 "do"의 쓰임이 다른 하나를 고르시오.
She does have a car.
What did she do last night?
I do the same kind of work as he does.
She does the dishes everyday.
> **정답** She does have a car.

---

**02.** 다음 문장의 밑줄 친 "do"와 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
You do look wonderful today.
They often do the house chores together.
I'll do the dishes after dinner.
They do not have to stay here tonight.
Mike does like climbing rocks.
> **정답** Mike does like climbing rocks.

---

**03.** 다음 밑줄 친 "do"와 쓰임이 다른 하나를 고르시오.
I do enjoy listening to music.
Did she do the homework?
She does love eating fast food.
I did meet him, but it was meaningless.
He does look happy today.
> **정답** Did she do the homework?

---

**04.** 다음 중 어법상 옳은 문장을 고르시오.
Mike do love his job.
I do have a lot of work to do.
You did came to see her every morning.
She did solved the problem by herself.
> **정답** I do have a lot of work to do.

---

**05.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 고르시오.
I did see him in front of the bank yesterday.
I do believe he is right.
Peter did put some water in his backpack this
morning.
He does teach English a long time ago.
> **정답** He does teach English a long time ago.

---

**06.** 다음 빈칸에 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
_______ was Paul that gave me a ride home.
What
It
This
That
> **정답** It

---

**07.** 다음 빈칸에 알맞은 것을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
It was my tablet PC _______ the thief stole last night.
who
that
which
where
> **정답** that, which

---

**08.** 다음 문장 중 It is ~ that을 이용하여 강조할 수 없는 것을
고르시오.
He found my puppy in the street this morning.
found
my puppy
in the street
He
> **정답** found

---

**09.** 다음 밑줄 친 It의 쓰임이 다른 하나를 고르시오.
It was a diamond ring that she was wearing at
the party.
It was last night that she got to the airport.
It is not certain that he did it on purpose.
It was the window that she broke by mistake.
> **정답** It is not certain that he did it on purpose.

---

**10.** 다음 밑줄 친 It의 쓰임이 다른 하나를 고르시오.
It was at the drug store that she stopped by
this morning.
It is her wish that her son will become a
doctor.
It was early in the morning that she cleaned
the bathroom.
It was her puppy that she walked in the park
yesterday.
> **정답** It is her wish that her son will become a doctor.

---

**11.** 밑줄 친 부분을 강조한 문장으로 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
Kelly was going to meet David this morning.
It was David that Kelly was going to meet him
this morning.
It was David that Kelly was going to meet this
morning.
It is David who Kelly is going to meet this
morning.
It was Kelly that was going to meet David this
morning.
> **정답** It was David that Kelly was going to meet this
morning.

---

**12.** 밑줄 친 부분을 강조한 문장으로 알맞은 것을 모두
고르시오. (2개)
One of John's sisters lives in Seoul.
It is in Seoul where one of John's sisters lives.
It is in Seoul that one of John's sisters lives.
It was in Seoul that one of John's sisters lives.
It is in Seoul who one of John's sisters lives.
> **정답** It is in Seoul where one of John's sisters lives., It is in
Seoul that one of John's sisters lives.

---

**13.** 다음 문장의 일부를 강조하여 쓴 문장 중 잘못된 것을
고르시오.
I borrowed the book from Chris yesterday.
It was borrowed that I the book from Chris
yesterday.
It was yesterday that I borrowed the book
from Chris.
It was I that borrowed the book from Chris
yesterday.
It was the book which I borrowed from Chris
yesterday.
> **정답** It was borrowed that I the book from Chris
yesterday.

---

**14.** 다음 문장의 일부를 강조하여 쓴 문장 중 잘못된 것을
고르시오.
She called me twice last night.
It was me that she called twice last night.
It was last night where she called me twice.
It was she who called me twice last night.
She did call me twice last night.
> **정답** It was last night where she called me twice.

---

**15.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분과 바꾸어 쓸 수 있는 것을 고르시오.
It was her pet dog that made a mess of the kitchen.
where
who
when
which
> **정답** which

---

**16.** 다음 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
A: What did you find in the room yesterday?
B: It was _______________ that I found there.
this book
me
in the room
yesterday
> **정답** this book

---

**17.** 다음 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
A: Did your sister decorate the wall?
B: No, it was _______________ that decorated it.
my mother
my house
decorated
the wall
> **정답** my mother

---

**18.** 다음 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
A: When did you go to see the concert?
B: It was _______________ that we saw the concert.
in the hall
Paul and I
tomorrow
last Sunday
> **정답** last Sunday

---

**19.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바꾼 것 중 어색한 것을 모두
고르시오.
어제 내게 그가 보낸 것은 바로 그 꽃이었다.
→ It was the flower that he sent me yesterday.
우리가 그를 처음 만난 것은 바로 2020년이었다.
→ It was him that we met in 2020 for the first
time.
어제 그를 만난 사람은 바로 나였다.
→ It was I that met him yesterday.
내가 작년에 그를 만났던 곳은 바로 그 공원이었다.
→ It was him that I met in the park last year.
> **정답** 내가 작년에 그를 만났던 곳은 바로 그 공원이었다. → It was
him that I met in the park last year., 우리가 그를 처음
만난 것은 바로 2020년이었다. → It was him that we met
in 2020 for the first time.

---

**20.** 다음 중 어법상 옳은 문장을 고르시오.
It is yesterday that I bought a new computer.
It is Kelly who we would like to meet most.
It is at the library which I study every day.
It was Jim which I met yesterday.
> **정답** It is Kelly who we would like to meet most.
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 162 강조구문중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분을 강조하는 문장을 완성하시오.
Mr. Smith gives us a lot of homework.
→ Mr. Smith  (     )  us a lot of
homework.
정답 does give

---

**02.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분을 강조하는 문장을 완성하시오.
Tom wanted you to join the soccer club.
→ Tom  (     )  you to join the soccer
club.
정답 did want

---

**03.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분을 강조하는 문장을 완성하시오. (It
is/was ~ that 구문사용)
He was born in 1971.
정답 It was in 1971 that he was born. (It was in 1971 when
he was born.)

---

**04.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분을 강조하는 문장을 완성하시오. (It
is/was ~ that 구문사용)
She is going to buy a new car next week.
정답 It is a new car that she is going to buy next week. (It
is a new car which she is going to buy next week.)

---

**05.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분을 강조하는 문장을 완성하시오. (It
is/was ~ that 구문사용)
Tom called you five times yesterday.
정답 It was Tom that called you five times yesterday. (It
was Tom who called you five times yesterday.)

---

**06.** 우리말과 같은 뜻이 되도록 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여
문장을 완성하시오.
내가 어제 그녀를 만난 곳은 바로 그 서점이었다.
힌트 (     ) yesterday, met, I, at, the, bookstore, her,
that
It was  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
her yesterday.
정답 at, the, bookstore, that, I, met

---

**07.** 우리말과 같은 뜻이 되도록 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여
문장을 완성하시오.
내가 그 가게에서 샀던 것은 바로 그 카메라였다.
힌트 (     ) I, the, camera, bought, that
It was  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  at the
shop.
정답 the, camera, that, I, bought

---

**08.** 우리말과 같은 뜻이 되도록 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여
문장을 완성하시오.
그의 반에서 가장 키가 큰 학생은 바로 Paul이다.
힌트 (     ) the, tallest, student, is, who, Paul
It is  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  in
his class.
정답 Paul, who, is, the, tallest, student

---

**09.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 어법에 맞게 고쳐 쓰시오.
James does call her to apologize yesterday.
James  (     )  to apologize yesterday.
정답 did call her

---

**10.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 어법에 맞게 고쳐 쓰시오.
It is my sister that fed the dog last night.
 fed the dog last
night.
정답 It was my sister that

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 162: 강조구문 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 밑줄 친 "do"의 쓰임이 다른 하나를 고르시오.
He does have a bicycle.
What did she do last weekend?
I do the same kind of exercise as she does.
She does the laundry every Sunday.
> 정답: He does have a bicycle.

---

**02.** 다음 문장의 밑줄 친 "do"와 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
You do look amazing today.
They often do their homework together.
I'll do the cleaning after school.
They do not have to leave right now.
Amy does like baking cookies.
> 정답: Amy does like baking cookies.

---

**03.** 다음 밑줄 친 "do"와 쓰임이 다른 하나를 고르시오.
I do enjoy playing basketball.
Did she do the assignment?
She does love reading novels.
I did meet her, but it was brief.
He does look healthy today.
> 정답: Did she do the assignment?

---

**04.** 다음 중 어법상 옳은 문장을 고르시오.
Tom do love his hobby.
I do have a lot of tasks to complete.
You did came to visit her every weekend.
She did solved the puzzle by herself.
> 정답: I do have a lot of tasks to complete.

---

**05.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 고르시오.
I did see her in front of the library yesterday.
I do believe she is talented.
Amy did put some snacks in her bag this morning.
He does teach music a long time ago.
> 정답: He does teach music a long time ago.

---

**06.** 다음 빈칸에 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
_______ was Amy that lent me a textbook.
What It This That
> 정답: It

---

**07.** 다음 빈칸에 알맞은 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) It was my backpack _______ the thief stole last weekend. who that which where
> 정답: that, which

---

**08.** 다음 문장 중 It is ~ that을 이용하여 강조할 수 없는 것을 고르시오.
She found my notebook in the classroom this morning. found my notebook in the classroom She
> 정답: found

---

**09.** 다음 밑줄 친 It의 쓰임이 다른 하나를 고르시오.
It was a silver necklace that she was wearing at the ceremony.
It was last weekend that she arrived at the airport.
It is not certain that he did it intentionally.
It was the vase that she broke by accident.
> 정답: It is not certain that he did it intentionally.

---

**10.** 다음 밑줄 친 It의 쓰임이 다른 하나를 고르시오.
It was at the bookstore that she stopped by this afternoon.
It is her dream that her daughter will become an artist.
It was early in the morning that she organized the living room.
It was her puppy that she walked in the park yesterday.
> 정답: It is her dream that her daughter will become an artist.

---

**11.** 밑줄 친 부분을 강조한 문장으로 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
Amy was going to meet Tom this afternoon.
It was Tom that Amy was going to meet him this afternoon.
It was Tom that Amy was going to meet this afternoon.
It is Tom who Amy is going to meet this afternoon.
It was Amy that was going to meet Tom this afternoon.
> 정답: It was Tom that Amy was going to meet this

---

**12.** 밑줄 친 부분을 강조한 문장으로 알맞은 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) One of Amy's brothers lives in Tokyo.
It is in Tokyo where one of Amy's brothers lives.
It is in Tokyo that one of Amy's brothers lives.
It was in Tokyo that one of Amy's brothers lives.
It is in Tokyo who one of Amy's brothers lives.
> 정답: It is in Tokyo where one of Amy's brothers lives., It is in

---

**13.** 다음 문장의 일부를 강조하여 쓴 문장 중 잘못된 것을 고르시오.
I returned the book to Amy yesterday.
It was returned that I the book to Amy yesterday.
It was yesterday that I returned the book to Amy.
It was I that returned the book to Amy yesterday.
It was the book which I returned to Amy yesterday.
> 정답: It was returned that I the book to Amy

---

**14.** 다음 문장의 일부를 강조하여 쓴 문장 중 잘못된 것을 고르시오.
He texted me three times last night.
It was me that he texted three times last night.
It was last night where he texted me three times.
It was he who texted me three times last night.
He did text me three times last night.
> 정답: It was last night where he texted me three times.

---

**15.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분과 바꾸어 쓸 수 있는 것을 고르시오.
It was her kitten that made a mess of the bedroom. where who when which
> 정답: which

---

**16.** 다음 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
A: What did you discover in the attic yesterday?
B: It was _______________ that I discovered there. this painting me in the attic yesterday
> 정답: this painting

---

**17.** 다음 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
A: Did your brother paint the fence?
B: No, it was _______________ that painted it. my uncle my backyard painted the fence
> 정답: my uncle

---

**18.** 다음 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
A: When did you go to see the exhibit?
B: It was _______________ that we saw the exhibit. in the museum Tom and I next Friday last Saturday
> 정답: last Saturday

---

**19.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바꾼 것 중 어색한 것을 모두 고르시오.
어제 내게 그녀가 보낸 것은 바로 그 편지였다. → It was the letter that she sent me yesterday. 우리가 그녀를 처음 만난 것은 바로 2021년이었다. → It was her that we met in 2021 for the first time. 어제 그녀를 만난 사람은 바로 나였다. → It was I that met her yesterday. 내가 작년에 그녀를 만났던 곳은 바로 그 카페였다. → It was her that I met in the cafe last year.
> 정답: 내가 작년에 그녀를 만났던 곳은 바로 그 카페였다. → It was

**20.** 다음 중 어법상 옳은 문장을 고르시오.
It is last week that I bought a new tablet.
It is Amy who we would like to invite most.
It is at the park which I exercise every day.
It was Tom which I saw yesterday.
> 정답: It is Amy who we would like to invite most.
